mapper.sql: select knowledge_file_id, knowledge_id, file_name, file_type, file_size, file_usage, is_template, parse_status, image_status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag from tdw_knowledge_file
mapper.insert: insert into tdw_knowledge_file(knowledge_id, file_name, file_type, file_size, file_usage, is_template, parse_status, image_status, create_by, create_time, remark, del_flag) values(#{knowledgeId}, #{fileName}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{fileUsage}, #{isTemplate}, #{parseStatus}, #{imageStatus}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark}, '0')
mapper.update: update tdw_knowledge_file set del_flag = '2' where knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId}
